name: Plum Petite Four
ingredients: Cal X: 10g cal x, 1 litre water
steps: Whisk Cal X into measured water.
Leave at room temperature for 4-5 days.
Dry and make powder for Wagu.
Place the peeled plums in cal x bath and rotate every 5 minutes to avoid the cal sitting on the bottom.
Rinse after 1 hour but retain bath for re-use.
Vacuum pack with 60% sugar syrup with fresh yuzu (if in season).
Cook in oven until soft (approx. 90 mins).
Stand up tight and dehydrate until desired texture (2-3 hours at 55 degrees).
Using tweezers, remove the stone from the plums.

other_details.finishing_and_plating: Agar Blossom Sugar, Extra syrup 10g agar blossom
